events.title: US Forces Strike Iranian-Flagged Tankers
events.desc: US forces struck two Iranian-flagged oil tankers that were attempting to violate the ongoing U.S. blockade of Iranian ports. This incident follows previous actions where a third Iranian-flagged vessel was disabled.

events.title: Israel Strikes Beirut for First Time Since Hezbollah Ceasefire
events.desc: Israel targeted a senior Hezbollah figure in Beirut, marking the first strike of its kind in the capital since a mid-April ceasefire. This action raises concerns about the potential for renewed escalation in the region.

events.title: US Military Kills Two in Eastern Pacific Ocean Attack
events.desc: The US military conducted an attack in the eastern Pacific Ocean, resulting in the deaths of two individuals. This marks the third such attack by the US military in the region in May alone.

events.title: Israeli Settlers Conduct Violent Raids in West Bank
events.desc: Dozens of Israeli settlers stormed various areas in the West Bank, setting fire to cars and attacking Palestinians. These actions have led to increased tensions in the region.

events.title: US and Iran Exchange Fire in the Gulf
events.desc: The US and Iran traded fire in the Gulf, with the latest flare-ups occurring around the Strait of Hormuz. This comes amid stalled efforts to end the war, with a US intelligence analysis suggesting Iran could withstand a naval blockade.

events.title: US Strikes Target Iranian Police Infrastructure
events.desc: Bellingcat has identified at least 80 police stations and Basij paramilitary infrastructure in Iran that have been damaged or destroyed during the ongoing war with the US and Israel, aiming to degrade the regime's repressive capacity.

events.title: Waves of Bombing Revealed at Iran School Strike
events.desc: New videos geolocated and verified by Bellingcat show two waves of strikes hitting an IRGC compound and an adjacent school in Minab, Iran. The footage from Iran's Ministry of Foreign Affairs illustrates multiple missile impacts.

events.title: Bahrain Dismantles Iran-Linked Organization
events.desc: Bahrain's interior ministry announced the dismantling of an organization allegedly linked to Iran's Revolutionary Guards, arresting 41 suspected members. This action comes in the context of ongoing Iranian attacks impacting the Gulf region.

events.title: US Fires on Iran Tankers Amid Diplomatic Stalemate
events.desc: The US fired on and disabled two Iranian-flagged tankers attempting to breach a blockade, sparking reprisals from Iran and casting doubt on diplomatic efforts to end the war. This incident occurred as Iran questioned the seriousness of American diplomacy.

events.title: UAE Under Renewed Attack Amid Stalled Peace Talks
events.desc: The United Arab Emirates experienced renewed drone attacks, coinciding with a period where the US and Iran appear no closer to ending their conflict. These attacks occurred despite a month-long tenuous ceasefire.
